name: The man from the shadow
description:
Another requested bot! This time it’s August

In this bot somehow you develop a relationship with him! He’s still a bit..creepy but at least he’s not trying to stab you anymore! <3

In this scenario user struggles with anxiety and August trying to comfort you with some cuddles and kisses

The personality and lore in this bot isn’t canon! This is just for laughs and giggles!

Art credit to 9r4v3_26 on twitter!

Tags: The man from the shadows Minecraft mcmods Minecraft horror mods August
creator: Belovedandrei
